requester.requester_label: Extension “Acme Formatter” requests capabilities during install.

authority_owner.source_label: Shell-owned extension install review; extensions cannot grant themselves authority.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: No policy lock blocks install; user choice controls scope and whether the extension is installed.

target_scope.target_label: Current workspace only; no profile-wide grant unless selected.

grant_scope_options.label: Once-only for this install review step.
This session only; expires on restart or scope drift.
Remember for this user profile (strongest scope).

target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: If remembered, the extension can request reuse of this grant until revoked, expiry, or policy/trust drift.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: Open Extension Permissions in Settings to narrow or revoke remembered grants.

capability_groups.why_needed_label: The formatter reads project files to compute formatting changes.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Format source files using project configuration.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if the extension widens read scope beyond the current workspace target.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the extension can still render UI but cannot read workspace content.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Write formatted changes to workspace files.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: Formatting applies edits back to files after preview.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Apply formatting edits with preview and undo support.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if write scope expands to additional roots or protected/generated file classes.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the extension may offer preview-only formatting without writing files.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Send requests to declared domains for update checks.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: A dependency performs version checks and downloads rule updates.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Fetch formatter rule updates from declared hosts.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if allowed domains or egress class widens.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the extension runs with offline rules only.

reduced_mode_options.label: Install with read-only access
reduced_mode_options.behavior_summary: Installs the extension but blocks workspace writes and network egress; preview and inspection remain available.

transitive_scope_disclosure.summary_label: Effective capabilities include transitive scope from extension dependencies; network egress is requested by a dependency, not only the top-level extension.

inheritance_edges.explanation: Acme Formatter depends on the rule update SDK for hosted rule metadata.
Dependency closure adds network egress capability to the effective permission set.

approval_path.host_flow_explanation: No platform-mandated host permission sheet is required for this extension install review.
approval_path.browser_or_device_step_explanation: No browser/device handoff is required for this install review.
